pattern: Record each character's position in s via a hash map, then accumulate absolute index differences against t in a single pass.
hints: You need the position of every character in s quickly — consider building a lookup table first.
For each position j in t, find where that same character appears in s, and add the absolute difference of those two indices.
Build a dict mapping char -> index for s in O(n), then iterate t once summing |pos_in_s[t[j]] - j|.

edge_inputs.description: s and t are identical, difference is zero
only the last character is displaced
pair of characters swapped in the middle

stress.description: random permutation of 26 distinct lowercase letters
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    chars = list('abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz')
    rng.shuffle(chars)
    s = ''.join(chars)
    t_chars = list(s)
    rng.shuffle(t_chars)
    t = ''.join(t_chars)
    return [s, t]
